subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones in My lands! Hearken unto My call, which hath been raised from the Lote-Tree of Mine utterance that speaketh amidst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی فی بلادی ان استمعوا ندائی انه ارتفع من سدره بیانی التی تنطق بین
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @belief and denial, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
